zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Roberts於1460年3月13日出生在英國肯特可藍別盧可時，她的父親Walter Roberts22歲，母親Margaret Penn19歲。她於大約1483年與Gervase Hendley在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1508年享年48歲，埋葬在英國肯特可藍別盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Roberts于1460年3月13日出生在英国肯特可藍別盧可时，她的父亲Walter Roberts22岁，母亲Margaret Penn19岁。她于大约1483年与Gervase Hendley在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1508年享年48岁，埋葬在英国肯特可藍別盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Roberts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the personal name Robert , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also occasionally borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Robert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Gilles, Normand, Armand, Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Michel, Edouard, Gaston, Yves.

French, Walloon, English, German, Dutch, Flemish, and Breton (of French origin); Hungarian (Róbert): from the ancient Germanic personal name Ro(d)bert (Middle English Robert, Old French Ro(d)bert), composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This is found occasionally in Anglo-Saxon England before the Conquest, but in the main it was introduced into England by the Normans and quickly became popular among all classes of society. Pet forms and diminutives are found from an early date, Robin being particularly common. Compare Robair , Robar , Robare , and Rober .
In some cases also an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Roberds
meanings: English: variant of   Roberts  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Robarts
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Hertfortshire): variant of   Roberts  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Roberts was born on 13 March 1460, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, her father, Walter Roberts, was 22 and her mother, Margaret Penn, was 19. She married Gervase Hendley about 1483, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1508, at the age of 48, and was buried in Cranbrook, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Roberts est née le 13 mars 1460, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Walter Roberts, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Penn, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Gervase Hendley environ 1483, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1508, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Roberts am 13. März 1460 in Cranbrook, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Roberts 22 und ihre Mutter Margaret Penn 19. Sie hat um 1483 in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom Gervase Hendley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1508 im Alter von 48 Jahren und wurde in Cranbrook, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Roberts è nata il il 13 marzo 1460 nel Cranbrook, Kent, England, sua padre, Walter Roberts, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Margaret Penn, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Gervase Hendley circa 1483, nel Cranbrook, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1508, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Cranbrook, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Robertsが1460年3月13日にイギリスケントクランブルークで生まれた時，父Walter Robertsは22歳，母Margaret Pennは19歳であった。約1483年にイギリスイギリスケントクランブルークでGervase Hendleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1508年に48歳で死去し，イギリスケントクランブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Roberts(이)가 1460년 3월 13일 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Roberts(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Penn(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1483년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에서 Gervase Hendley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1508년 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Roberts nasceu em 13 de março de 1460, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Roberts, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Penn, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Gervase Hendley aproximadamente 1483, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1508, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Roberts родилась 13 марта 1460 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Roberts было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Penn, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gervase Hendley около 1483 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1508 г. в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Roberts nació el 13 de marzo de 1460, en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Roberts, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Penn, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Gervase Hendley aproximadamente 1483, en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1508, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra.
